reports.incident_description: Porter team late to move prepped patient from Surgical Ward 3A to OT; anaesthesia set-up waiting. Request immediate trolley transfer and lift booking.
Light rain made ambulance bay slick; crew needs anti-slip mats and two extra hands to load a non-ambulant OPD patient safely.
Inter-facility transfer for NSTEMI to NHSL; ambulance oxygen gauge fluctuating—please swap to ready unit with full cylinders now.
Time-sensitive CSF and blood cultures awaiting pickup from Ward 5B; need porter with biohazard cooler to Microbiology immediately.
Bariatric post-op patient requires transfer from OT recovery to ICU; need bariatric trolley, slide sheet, and at least four porters.
Emergency O negative and FFP to Theatre for ruptured ectopic; send cooler, documentation book, and escort now.
Short rain made main ramp to CT slippery; request transport to reroute and assist wheelchair moves via Ward 2 corridor until dry.
Patient for first dialysis at 07:30; no functional wheelchair on Ward 7B. Need immediate transfer to Renal Unit.
Ambulance bay blocked by private cars; transport to marshal drivers and reposition fleet—non-emergency transfer due in 10 minutes.
Neonate on CPAP to be shifted ETU→NICU; require transport incubator, portable O2, and trained porter team.
MRI at 07:30 PM; ortho patient in traction needs vacuum mattress and three porters for safe transfer from 4C.
AC not cooling in A05 under strong sun; request spare ambulance for inter-hospital referral to KDU and schedule repair.
Category 1 LSCS—move mother to OT immediately; need trolley, lift priority, and corridor clearance.
Two-person assist required to bring hemiplegic patient to rehab gym; current wheelchair footrest broken—please provide replacement and escort.
Morning showers pooling at rear gate; ambulance 24 needs alternative exit and escort for STEMI pickup at Moratuwa clinic.
TB PCR specimens must reach reference lab within 60 minutes; assign dedicated driver and Category B biohazard cooler.
Post-appendectomy patient deteriorating; urgent transfer to radiology for ultrasound—porter team delayed 30 minutes.
Audit found expired AED pads and missing suction tubing in ambulance A03; pull from roster and restock, then document readiness.
Two trauma referrals en route simultaneously; require second ambulance crew, spine boards, and triage bay prepared.
Platelets for Ward 6 Oncology need hand-carry; send temp-controlled carrier and immediate porter escort.
CT brain 07:30; drowsy patient requires oxygen and head support during move—assign trained porter and monitor.
Light rain turned ambulance wash bay muddy; gurney wheels clogging. Request transport to shift decontamination to covered area and clean.
Suspected dengue with GI bleed to be moved to HDU; need sanitized trolley, spill kit, and priority lift.
Intubated patient to be shifted OT→ICU; require ventilator-capable transfer trolley and coordinated lift access.
Siren intermittently failing on Ambulance A07 during test; remove from duty roster, assign reserve, and log repair.
Dizzy patient needs wheelchair transfer from OPD triage to Radiology for X-ray; no porters available at desk. Please send chair and staff.
Pre-shift check: Ambulance 02 oxygen regulator gauge stuck at 2 L/min despite closed valve; cannot dispatch until serviced. Request immediate replacement unit.
Need transport team with portable monitor and lift coordination to move ventilated patient (Bed 5) to CT and back safely.
Time-sensitive biopsy specimens for courier to reference lab must leave by 16:45; assigned driver on sick leave. Kindly dispatch alternate ambulance.
Post-laparotomy patient ready for transfer from OT 3 to Surgical Ward 2B; require clean stretcher with straps and two porters.
Queue building at OPD entrance; only one functional wheelchair. Request two additional wheelchairs to gate and porter cover.
Ambulance bay floor wet after brief rain; loading polytrauma case now. Need transport staff to cordon area and assist safe stretcher transfer.
Stretcher straps in Ambulance 04 damp and musty from humidity; please replace and sanitize before next run.
Urgent: 2 units PRBC for Theatre 2 (ruptured ectopic) need immediate escorted transfer in validated cooler.
Request careful transfer of incubated neonate from NICU to SCBU due to AC fault; need transport team with neonatal trolley and lift booking.
Non-emergency inter-facility transfer required: chronic dialysis patient to Base Hospital Homagama. Please assign ambulance with oxygen available.
Windscreen wiper failure on Ambulance 03 during thundershowers; vehicle unsafe. Request backup crew to cover calls and maintenance tow.
Sedated child for MRI now ready; rain has delayed porters. Need immediate assisted transfer from Ward 7 to MRI before sedation wears off.
Pre-planned transfer to Lady Ridgeway: tyre pressure alarm on Ambulance 05. Please switch to standby vehicle and check tyres.
Bariatric patient (approx. 140 kg) from Cardio Ward needs transfer to CT with hovermat and bariatric stretcher; require 4 transport staff.
Morning crowd in heat; elderly patients struggling from main gate. Request shuttle of three wheelchairs to gate and a porter rotation.
Deceased transfer from ICU Bed 3 to mortuary needed with privacy screens and documentation escort; family waiting.
Corridor between ETU and X-ray is wet after light rain; need transport to reroute and assist stretcher transfer for chest X-ray now.
Urgent CSF and blood cultures from ETU require immediate hand-carry to Micro with cold chain. Please dispatch runner.
Ambulance AC not cooling; patient with heat exhaustion scheduled for inter-ward transfer. Allocate alternate air-conditioned vehicle.
Two post-dialysis patients hypotensive; need wheelchairs and transport assistance back to Medical Ward 3A promptly.
Please relocate portable ultrasound machine to Ward 4D; requires equipment trolley and lift access coordination.
Rear door latch on Ambulance 01 failed during gusty shower; patient in transit for CT. Send replacement ambulance to bay and urgent on-site fix.
FFP for ICU patient needs immediate transfer with ice packs; routine runner delayed. Request fastest available transport.
Outreach clinic ambulance double-booked; chemo patient waiting for transfer to radiation unit. Need second crew dispatched.
Non-ambulant stroke-suspect for urgent CT; need priority porter with monitor-ready trolley to Radiology in 10 mins; Lift 2 is crowded.
Ambulance 04 AC failed mid transfer; septic patient overheating. Request immediate vehicle swap at the bay and crew support with cool packs.
Private cars blocking ambulance dock. Please send transport supervisor to clear bay and place cones; code blue ambulance due in 5 minutes.
After the thunder shower the ETU ramp is slick; stretcher wheels skidding. Need anti-slip mats and two porters immediately for safe transfer.
O-negative blood needed in OR 3. Current cooler lacks ice packs. Dispatch transport runner with validated cooler now.
Transport incubator shows 30% battery pre-transfer to CT. Require neonatal transfer trolley with spare battery and trained porter.
Storm building; external courier stuck. Please dispatch hospital vehicle to carry urgent cultures to reference lab with chain-of-custody forms.
Wipers streaking and headlight fog after the downpour; visibility unsafe. Request swap to spare ambulance and schedule maintenance tonight.
Ambulance 06 TPMS alarm; spare tyre is bald. Need tyre change before night shift coverage begins.
Bariatric patient (165 kg) for MRI; standard trolley too narrow. Request bariatric stretcher team with side rails.
Lift 3 offline after rain. Emergency debridement patient stuck in Ward 8. Need alternate route and extra porters with slide board.
Two transfers to X-ray missed due to porter gap post-lunch. Request dedicated porter cover 1–3 PM and immediate move for #NOF case.
Heavy rain pooling at ambulance bay; vehicles can’t reverse to dock. Please shift loading point to Side Gate B and place marshals.
Link corridor floor wet; NSTEMI patient needs transfer. Send two porters and non-slip sheets immediately for safe move to Cath Lab.
Ambulance 12 radio battery dead while off-campus. Need spare radio issued urgently and temporary phone relay set up.
O2 cylinder bracket loose; cylinder shifting on speed breakers. Ground vehicle and send mechanic or provide swap unit now.
Post-storm power flicker; defib self-test failed in Ambulance 02. Require immediate equipment swap and unit check.
Rain-slick ramp to theatre; stretcher slid during attempt. Need transport mats and two staff to escort now.
Morning shuttle running late; three CKD patients waiting. Arrange second van loop and update driver roster.
Crossmatched units for ICU en route; carrier temp logger reads 9°C. Need validated cooler and immediate hand-carry by transport.
Siren intermittent after rain; unsafe for night calls. Request spare vehicle and raise electrical repair ticket.
Non-AC transfer van too hot; elderly patients became dizzy. Allocate AC van for clinic runs this session and rotate drivers.
Specimen cooler leaked serum in van. Take vehicle offline for biohazard clean and send leak-proof boxes; preserve chain-of-custody.
Fuel card missing; unit stranded at CPC pump. Request supervisor authorization and dispatch spare card immediately.
Bariatric ambulance tail-lift lost pressure in rain while loading #NOF patient. Transfer aborted; send alternate unit with manual ramp now.
Porters have not come for CT transfer from Ward 3A; patient is prepped and slot is at 10:00. Request immediate trolley and staff escort.
Neonate needs urgent inter-facility transfer for surgical review. Thunderstorm is slowing city traffic; require ambulance with transport incubator and full crew now.
Heavy rain has pooled near the ambulance dock; gurney wheels slipping on offload. Need transport team to reposition vehicles and lay anti-slip mats.
Radio communication intermittent during thunder. Please activate backup call tree to coordinate two scheduled non-emergency transfers.
Ambulance 12 returned with a loose oxygen cylinder bracket after rough travel in wind. Ground the vehicle and send maintenance.
Patient for echo needs wheelchair escort to Cardiology now; all wheelchairs on this floor are occupied. Please send a chair and porter.
O negative units required in OT within 10 minutes; Lift 3 is down after rain leak. Request validated cooler and porter via alternate route.
Clinic overflow at triage; wheelchair queue building. Please redeploy chairs from Radiology and assign two porters for continuous shuttle.
RTA call-out requires immediate dispatch; access road is partly flooded. Need 4x4 ambulance and driver familiar with diversion route.
Bariatric patient for MRI; current stretcher too narrow. Request bariatric trolley and four staff for safe transfer.
Scheduled 11:00 specimen pickup missed; cultures time-sensitive. Please expedite shuttle from SICU to Micro lab.
Emergency C-section declared; patient at Labour Room (LR) with stretcher lift halted by storm. Need OT trolley and manual transfer via ramp now.
Ambulance 07 due for service; engine temp high in heat and AC weak. Request immediate vehicle swap and schedule maintenance.
Wet ramp outside Ward 4B; patient to X-ray cannot ambulate. Need two porters and slide board to prevent slip.
STAT blood gases and cultures to lab are delayed by rain. Request dedicated transport to complete two runs within 20 minutes.
Post-dialysis wheelchair backlog; three patients waiting over 30 minutes for return to OPD pickup. Need extra transporters urgently.
NICU baby requires transfer to tertiary centre for ventilation; storm forming. Need neonatal ambulance with incubator, suction, and paramedic immediately.
Massive transfusion in OT; request continuous shuttle from Blood Bank. Lifts delayed due to thunder—send porter with validated cool box via service stairs.
Backup ambulance wipers failing in heavy rain; visibility unsafe. Require immediate vehicle changeover or blade replacement at bay.
Sputum specimens ready late; need cold-chain to TB lab across campus during downpour. Current ice packs insufficient—request replacements and driver.
Near-fall on wet corridor while moving patient from Physio to Ward 5A. Request transport escort for remaining transfers and prompt drying support.
Two non-emergency ambulance bookings were double-allocated to Unit 14 at 11:00. Need dispatcher to reassign vehicle and inform families.
Ambulance returning with stroke patient reports severe waterlogging on standard route. Please authorize alternate high-ground route and hold a second unit on standby.
Inter-ward transfer on portable ventilator; ambulance ventilator battery alarming low. Need fully charged unit at emergency bay immediately.
Post-OPD closure and storm, multiple wheelchairs stranded at car park with pooled water. Request night-shift transport to recover, sanitize, and restock to triage.
Cath lab transfer held up as ambulance bay is waterlogged after the downpour; request covered trolley, anti-skid mats, and two porters immediately.
Non-emergency ambulance for transfer to Base Hospital Kalutara cannot pass the flooded main road; dispatch 4x4 unit and reroute via alternate road.
Ward 12 head CT patient not brought; please send wheelchair with escort now, CT slot holds only 10 minutes.
STAT O-negative units needed in OT; send runner with validated cooler and ensure dry passage as corridors near OT are wet.
Ambulance A4 wiper motor failed in monsoon rain during NICU transfer standby; send backup ambulance and arrange urgent repair.
Tilt-in-space wheelchair unavailable for spinal patient to X-ray; need bariatric chair and two porters due to slippery floors after thunder shower.
Request transfer trolley with working straps and oxygen hanger to move post-op patient back to Ward 7 now.
Door seal leak on Ambulance A1 soaked kits in squally rain; require vehicle swap and deep clean/sanitization before next dispatch.
Specimen boxes are backing up at OPD; kindly run an extra van trip to Microbiology and Histopath with chitty slips signed.
Two inpatients due for dialysis still in ward; send alternate stretcher (current brakes jammed) with porter escort urgently.
Severe pre-eclampsia requires inter-facility transfer; need ALS ambulance with functioning monitors and second driver—roads are waterlogged.
Fuel card for Ambulance A3 failed; authorize cash fueling and rotate a standby vehicle to maintain night ETU cover.
Please send porter team with oxygen-ready wheelchair to Echo room before 08:30 as lift maintenance may force stair-chair use.
CT transfer for polytrauma needs covered trolley and transport escort via alternate corridor—radiology tunnel is waterlogged after the storm.
Rear door gas strut on Ambulance A2 is failing and drops in the wind; stand the vehicle down and assign spare until replaced.
Frozen section from OT to Histopath requires immediate hand-carry with cooler; lift out of service—send trained runner to sign chain-of-custody.
Prepare neonatal transport incubator and escort to Theatre for emergency C-section resus; require warm trolley and elevator priority.
Unstable COPD patient for ICU; dispatch oxygen-equipped stretcher with two porters and clear route—storms have crowded lifts.
Urgent blood-gas cartridges needed in ICU and ETU; internal run stalled by rain—send immediate delivery with cold pack.
Please assign a dedicated porter for the next three Ortho MRI patients; multiple weather delays today are derailing the list.
Ambulance offload bay is rain-swept; stretcher linen wet—send dry set and move offload to indoor ramp with transport escort.
Plaster room patient to X-ray lacks suitable wheelchair; please provide chair with footrests and a lifting strap.
Siren/PA intermittently failing after prolonged rain; request immediate check and fit temporary external siren so A1 can stay on road.
Need additional two porters and spine board for bariatric transfer from Ward 9 to OT; standard stretcher unsafe.
First three inpatients for ultrasound not yet arrived; request immediate pickups from Wards 2, 5, and 10 and start daily 08:45 porter circuit.
Morning downpour flooded the ambulance bay; request reroute and immediate patient offload at OPD canopy—need stretcher team and floor mats.
Ventilated patient due for CT; corridor floor wet after evening shower. Need trained porters with straps and slide sheet for safe transfer.
Siren/PA on Ambulance 09 intermittently failing after sudden rain burst; require electrical check and standby unit allocation.
Emergency appendicectomy patient needs immediate move to theatre; lift lobby crowded and damp. Request trolley with oxygen and two porters.
Two O-negative units needed urgently in NICU; routine courier delayed. Request dedicated runner with validated cooler within 15 minutes.
Ambulance 07 windscreen wipers failed after brief downpour; unit not roadworthy. Please activate spare vehicle and raise maintenance ticket.
Chest pain patient to Cath Lab; porters tied up. Need monitored trolley with O2 and priority access to Lift 2.
Pneumatic tube offline after lightning; require manual transport of CSF and blood cultures to Microbiology with chain-of-custody.
Bariatric patient (~180 kg) booked for X-ray; standard trolley unsafe. Request bariatric stretcher and six-person transfer team.
Two concurrent transfers: stroke thrombolysis candidate and polytrauma. Need ALS and BLS ambulances dispatched despite early rain delays.
Post-op unstable patient to ICU; transport trolley oxygen empty. Urgently need cylinder swap and trained porter.
Sedated MRI planned; please send wheelchair with porter who can wait and return patient directly to ward after imaging.
OPD ramp slick from drizzle; two wheelchairs with weak brakes. Need safer chairs and porter escort to prevent slips.
Strong coastal winds and brief rain causing GPS dropouts; crew cannot locate rural address. Request radio relay and staging at nearest police post.
Urgent neonate transfer to SCBU; require incubator ambulance, neonatal team, pre-warmed isolette, and rain covers for equipment.
Platelets needed in OT earlier than planned; arrange validated cooler and runner for direct handover, with temperature log.
Rear bay of Ambulance 03 damp after heavy pre-dawn rain; door seal leaking. Pull from service, dry/sanitize, and assign backup unit.
Patient on NIV to CT for CTPA; Lift 3 out. Need monitored transfer with portable O2 via service corridor.
Two dialysis patients awaiting pickup; transport van running late. Request staggered wheelchair moves to avoid missed slots.
Ambulance decontamination backlog; high humidity slowing drying. Please use UV cabinet and rotate fleet to keep two units ready.
Emergency transfer from peripheral hospital for perforated ulcer; need ALS ambulance with suction and two O2 cylinders, ETA adjusted for heavy rain patches.
Pharmacy fridge failed; insulin needs urgent cold-chain move to ward refrigerators. Request ice packs and temperature log sign-off.
Lift intermittently tripping after thunder; spinal injury to CT. Need scoop stretcher team via ramp and corridor traffic hold.
Rear tyre sidewall bulge on Ambulance 05 noted after wet run; vehicle unsafe. Request tyre change and replacement unit activation.
Category B specimens require hand-carry to reference lab across wing; need triple packaging, cool packs as indicated, and transport sign-offs.
Request two trained porters and neonatal transport trolley to move ventilated preterm from NICU to CT. Secure portable O2 and monitor; priority access to lift needed.
OPD ramp is wet after drizzle; need wheelchair and porter to escort elderly patient to X‑ray safely. Please arrange return after film.
Ambulance at side gate held by floodwater; need 4x4 or reroute to main entrance. Patient on oxygen for transfer to NHSL—dispatch support now.
Urgent cooler run: CSF and blood cultures from ICU waiting; previous courier delayed by rain. Need transport with ice packs to Central Lab within 15 min.
Wheelchair W13 brake not holding on dialysis slope; unsafe for patient movement. Replace immediately and take faulty unit for repair.
Slippery ambulance bay during rain; incoming trauma needs stretcher handover to ETU. Require extra porters and transfer board at bay.
Ambulance 06 oxygen cylinder bracket loose post-run; swap vehicle and send unit for immediate fix before night duty.
Inter-ward transfer to MRI for acute stroke; service lift intermittent after thunder. Need scoop stretcher and two porters; stair chair on standby.
Request immediate ambulance to transfer PPH to tertiary centre; ensure blood products secured and bypass traffic—storm causing delays.
Morning ortho rehab transfer missed; no porter arrived. Please assign escort with walker and arrange wheelchair return to Ward 12B.
Deliver 2 cross‑match O‑negative units to Theatre 1 now; cooler box missing at transport room. Need sealed cooler and runner within 10 minutes.
Shift ventilator and patient from SICU to Theatre 2; require transporters to secure lines and portable O2. Service lift booking requested.
Post‑rain ramp to Radiology is wet; bed transfer for polytrauma stuck. Need three porters and dry sheet for safe move to CT.
Audit found Ambulance 03 stretcher straps frayed; floor not sanitized after last case. Deep clean and strap replacement required before 2:00 PM.
Peds ward microbiology specimens ready; fridge power flickers. Need immediate hand-carry to Micro with chain-of-custody signed.
Ambulance returning in rain—wipers failed. Put spare vehicle on night cover and move faulty unit to workshop now.
Back ramp partially flooded; dialysis patients arriving. Reroute shuttle van to front gate and send extra wheelchairs for unit intake.
STEMI needing inter‑hospital transfer to cath lab; roads wet. Dispatch ALS ambulance, confirm defib readiness and coordinate fastest route.
Trauma stretcher caster broken in Ward 5; unsafe to move patient to OT. Send replacement stretcher and team for transfer in 20 min.
Cylinder exchange rounds missed; two surgical transfer trolleys reading near empty. Need immediate swap and check gauges before evening rounds.
Snakebite from rural MOH clinic—urgent pickup. Pack antivenom in cooler and send 4x4 ambulance due to rain and gusts.
Patient in tilt‑in‑space chair to Echo; corridors damp. Need two porters and straps for secure escort and return.
Night roster shows no driver assigned to Ambulance 05. Arrange cover immediately and manage key/vehicle handover.
PET‑CT access lift down; oncology patient ready. Send team with stretcher for alternate service corridor route and clear radiology bay.
Evening storm disrupting radio; ambulance dispatch intermittent. Activate phone fallback and send second unit to cover northern sector.
No porters available to move a post-op patient from OT to 3B; request immediate stretcher team with oxygen support.
Stat transfer to NHSL for CT perfusion delayed due to driver roster mix-up; need ambulance with monitor now.
ICU blood gases waiting at bedside; specimen pickup overdue 25 minutes. Request urgent transport runner.
Wheelchair for X-ray has faulty brake; please send replacement chair and porter escort for patient from OPD.
Heavy rain has stalled the returning ambulance near Borella. Patient pre-dialysis is waiting; dispatch alternate vehicle.
Wiper failure on Ambulance 12 during the storm; unsafe to proceed. Need backup unit for neonatal transfer immediately.
Inter-ward transfer to CT arrived with empty oxygen cylinder; request replacement cylinder and trained porter now.
Heat stress case en route; ambulance AC not cooling. Prepare cooled backup unit and ice packs at ambulance bay.
Rainwater made the loading ramp slippery; stretcher wheels skidding. Need absorbent mats and transport staff oversight.
Blood products pickup delayed; access road waterlogged. Request 4x4 or porter relay with insulated box to OT.
Bariatric patient needs MRI under GA; require wide trolley with proper straps and two senior porters.
OPD wheelchair stock exhausted; multiple elders waiting. Please redeploy two chairs from wards and assign a porter.
Ambulance radio channel has heavy static; dispatch missing ETU calls. Switch to backup set and confirm coverage.
Transfer to Karapitiya delayed by storm road closures; request alternate route plan and experienced driver.
Stretcher straps returned wet after rain; not fit for sepsis patient. Need sanitized dry set and transport escort.
CSF sample must reach lab within 10 minutes; porter not responding. Request immediate specimen run.
Dialysis shuttle nearly cancelled due to low diesel; need refuel and notification to affected wards for timing.
Traction patient going for X-ray; require scoop stretcher and two trained porters. Current team unfamiliar.
O-negative needed in Theatre 2 now; Lift 2 down. Arrange staircase relay with cooler and handover log.
Ambulance 7 stalled at OPD ramp in rain; blocking access. Need jump-start/tow and immediate deployment of spare.
Incubator transport trolley missing one restraint; ultrasound delayed. Request replacement straps from transport store.
Wheelchair van arrived without ramp for spinal patient to X-ray; resend correct vehicle and porter.
Specimen cooler returned without ice packs; freezer at bay reportedly off. Restock before evening dispatch runs.
Ambulance stuck at flooded hospital gate; STEMI transfer waiting. Need 4x4/tractor shuttle to main road now.
Two ambulances overdue for tyre rotation and stretcher rail lubrication; schedule service to maintain readiness.
Sedated patient from Ward 6 to MRI waiting; porter team not arrived and sedation window closing. Request immediate transfer with monitor-compatible trolley.
Inter-hospital transfer to Kandy: ambulance AC failing in afternoon heat; patient becoming uncomfortable despite fans. Need backup vehicle or rapid fix before departure.
Rain made the ambulance bay ramp slick; trauma patient on spinal board needs careful handover to X-ray. Require extra porters and non-slip mats now.
Scheduled non-emergency transfer to Echo kept waiting 40+ minutes; no wheelchair available. Please send wheelchair and escort.
Specimen runner missed 10:00 pickup from 7A; cultures require within 1 hr. Request immediate collection with secured biohazard box.
Moderate rain with gusts causing water pooling at ambulance bay; pram wheels slipping during NICU transfer. Need covered trolley and two porters to assist.
Ambulance 03 pre-trip check: oxygen cylinder retaining strap frayed and loose. Vehicle should be held until strap replaced.
After brief thunderstorm, siren on Ambulance 05 not functioning; ETU cover reduced. Dispatch standby unit or arrange immediate repair.
Bariatric patient from ICU to OT for urgent debridement; standard stretcher unsafe. Request powered stretcher and additional porters.
Cath Lab requested 2 units O-negative now; need transport with validated cold box to Lab within 10 min. Kindly prioritise.
CT transfer for head injury delayed; corridor near lifts wet after passing rain. Need porter team with slide board and caution cones.
Dialysis pickups double-booked; two patients waiting at gate for transport to Ward 3. Please coordinate ambulance van to avoid missed meds.
Wheelchair #12 brake not holding on OPD slope; near miss reported. Please swap unit and service brakes.
Heavy rain flooded Baseline Road; en route transfer to Teaching Hospital delayed. Request alternate route guidance and inform receiving ward.
Post-dengue case left stretcher and trolley soiled; need full sanitisation and restock (linen, straps) before next call.
Evening lab specimens for LFT/CRP not picked; lift backlog due to rain crowds. Send runner to collect from 8B before lab cut-off.
Suction unit battery on Ambulance 07 not charging after power flicker during thundery rain. Need battery swap or backup unit before night shift.
OPD entrance wet from earlier showers; crowd heavy. Please deploy extra wheelchairs and attendants to triage to prevent falls.
Portable ventilator mount in neonatal ambulance slightly loose; planned outborn transfer at 3 pm. Require technician/transport to secure mount and verify tie-downs.
Thunderstorm brought down a branch partially blocking ambulance entry. Request Transport to coordinate alternate gate access and guide arrivals.
Post-op transfer backlog: three cases awaiting move to Surgical Ward; porters tied up. Kindly send additional team with monitors.
Blood products for ORIF delayed due to heavy rain; need covered trolley and fast track from Blood Bank to OT.
Ambulance 09 wiper intermittent during pre-run check; unsafe for forecasted heavy rain. Hold vehicle and arrange quick repair or swap.
Return trip patients unsteady on wet ambulance bay ramp after showers. Please place anti-slip mats and provide escorts for two vans arriving now.
Fuel card declined at CPC pump after night run; cannot refuel Unit 04. Need approval/spare card to keep ETU standby.
Need a wheelchair with intact brakes to move 78-year-old to Echo; current chair’s rear wheel wobbles. Request transport assistance immediately.
Ambulance bay partially flooded during thunderstorm; stretchers getting stuck. Please relocate staging to OPD side and place sandbags.
Neonatal transfer requested to tertiary NICU; heavy rain has gridlocked routes. Require second ambulance and driver to meet time target.
Ambulance 04 cabin AC not cooling during intra-hospital shift; patient became dyspnoeic in heat. Please ground unit and service AC.
Transfer trolley oxygen at quarter level for MICU-to-CT move. Need cylinder swap and porter support before proceeding.
After lightning strike, siren and PA on Ambulance 02 are dead; hazards only. Request immediate repair and spare unit for night duty.
Specimen run delayed; lift lobby flooded. Need transport porters to hand-carry blood gases from Paeds to Lab with ice packs via stairs.
Two MRI transfers booked back-to-back; only one bariatric wheelchair available. Second patient lost slot. Please provide an additional chair.
Driver reported hydroplaning near hospital roundabout in storm. Request immediate tyre tread checks and rotations for all ambulances.
Recovery-to-ICU transfer delayed 25 minutes with Lift 3 stuck. Need transport to activate backup route and send extra porters during lift outages.
Fuel card declined at partner station; ambulance returning from inter-hospital run nearly empty. Require backup fueling protocol now.
Ambulance 05 contaminated with vomitus from dengue patient. Needs deep sanitization and full restock before redeployment.
OT asked for 4 O-negative urgently; last runner lacked validated cooler. Send transport with approved cold chain box immediately.
Thunderstorm caused radio dock failure; several handsets flat. Need spare batteries issued and overnight charging checks.
Wheelchair lift on patient van not deploying at OPD ramp; two plaster patients waiting. Please service or dispatch alternate vehicle.
OPD satellite samples missed the 3:00 pm shuttle. Some analytes near stability limits—request immediate ad hoc transport to Lab.
Canopy latch on Ambulance 06 loosened in gusty winds; water ingress noted. Secure and inspect before next dispatch.
Require two porters and transfer board for 160 kg patient to CT; prior attempt unsafe. Kindly schedule now.
Urgent noradrenaline and heparin infusions needed in MICU; storm slowing runners. Request transport pickup from Pharmacy with cold pouch.
Brake warning and soft pedal during squalls; patient delivered safely. Please ground unit and assign spare immediately.
Multiple syncopal cases from temple event expected. Need extra ambulances, crew recall, and staging at Gate B.
Lightning disrupted GPS on two ambulances. Switch to manual call-logging and route confirmation by phone until resolved.
Flooding at ambulance exit; vehicles bottoming out. Request transport to reroute via rear gate and place marshals.
Bariatric transfer stretcher missing left side rail for MRI patient; unsafe to move. Send compliant stretcher now.
NBC pickup delayed by thunderstorm; primary ambulance on stroke code. Assign second vehicle to collect packed cells urgently.
Request urgent inter-facility ambulance for STEMI to tertiary cardiac centre; heavy rain causing diversions—send ALS crew with defib and confirm ETA.
Rear wiper on Ambulance 07 failed in downpour; visibility unsafe. Need immediate vehicle swap and unit sent for repair/sanitization.
Neuro Ward stroke patient booked urgent MRI; corridors damp from rain. Please send two porters with stretcher and waterproof cover.
Crossmatch samples to Blood Bank delayed; link corridor waterlogged. Request sealed specimen carrier and porter escort.
Post-op patient to ICU on ventilator; lift slow—need transport team with portable oxygen, monitor, and straps.
Ambulance 03 returned with emesis contamination on stretcher and floor; require deep clean and spare stretcher before night shift.
OPD wheelchair missing both footrests; unsafe for transfer to X-ray. Send replacement chair and a porter.
Neonate requires transfer to SCBU during thunderstorm; need transport incubator and trained team immediately.
Two haemodialysis patients awaiting pickup; ramp slick from rain. Request two wheelchairs with belts and two porters.
Emergency O-negative units needed in OT; lift stuck. Send transport team to carry cold box via stairs now.
Bariatric patient (approx. 160 kg) to be moved from Ward 5 to Physio; standard trolley unsafe—send bariatric trolley and three porters.
Ambulance 12 brake light not working after rain; request workshop check and assign backup vehicle for night cover.
Two RTA cases en route; redeploy two ambulances to bay and stage extra stretchers. Rain is slowing offloads.
Patient in skeletal traction for urgent CT; need scoop stretcher and experienced porters for safe log-roll transfer.
Ambulance 05 logbook missing odometer entries for last two runs; cannot dispatch until reconciled—assist drivers to update.
CSF sample for urgent PCR to annex lab; rain heavy and slippery. Send porter with sealed carrier and PPE.
Post-anaesthesia patient desaturating while awaiting transfer; need priority corridor clearance and oxygen cylinder with trolley now.
Two ambulances returned with punctures from flooded road debris; arrange tyre change and allocate standby unit to cover ETU.
Wheelchair brake not holding on ramp for febrile neutropenic patient; request safe chair and porter escort to X-ray.
IABP console required urgently in Cath Lab for unstable patient; send trained team and confirm lift booking.
Three morning dialysis patients to be collected from Wards 2, 7, and 11; please send two extra wheelchairs and staggered pickup.
Postpartum haemorrhage patient to OT urgently; need rapid-response transfer trolley with suction and two porters.
Ambulance 02 AC failed during storm; monitor screens fogging. Request immediate vehicle swap and service.
Apheresis platelets for Ward 11 need delivery within 30 minutes; rain ongoing—dispatch porter with insulated cold box.
Schedule non-emergency ambulance at 02:00 PM for bed-bound patient to satellite unit for home dialysis training; wheelchair ramp access required.
Request immediate ambulance dispatch with high-clearance vehicle for postpartum hemorrhage transfer from peripheral clinic; roads are waterlogged due to thunder showers.
Two porters with stretcher needed at ambulance bay; ramp is wet and patient is bariatric, unsafe for single staff.
Please send motorbike/van courier for CSF sample to Central Lab within 30 minutes; morning showers delayed routine pickup.
Stroke code: transfer patient from ETU to CT urgently with oxygen and monitor; porter not arrived and slot is ready.
Need tilting wheelchair and two porters to take post-op hip patient to Physio; limited mobility and pain.
Rear tyre puncture on return from DGH; spare wheel missing; rain starting—request roadside support or replacement ambulance.
